payload.answer: Sam's Goldman employment is superseded; current memory should reflect that Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
citations: Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman
New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same person, Sam; the new fact updates employment status rather than introducing a new entity.

memory_cards.statement: Sam no longer works at Goldman; Sam joined Point72.
Previous memory that Sam works at Goldman is superseded by the newer employment update.

details: Detected direct contradiction on current employer.
Preserved the newer employment fact as current.
Avoided retaining superseded fact as current.

repair_options: Replace 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam joined Point72 after leaving Goldman'.
Store Goldman only as a former employer and Point72 as current employer.

raw_text: {"intent":"conflict_classification","decision":"supersede","memory_cards":[{"kind":"update","statement":"Sam no longer works at Goldman; Sam joined Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former employer"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"current employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"left_employer","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"joined_employer","object":"Point72"}]},{"kind":"retract","statement":"Previous memory that Sam works at Goldman is superseded by the newer employment update.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"reuse_existing_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input refers to the same person, Sam; the new fact updates employment status rather than introducing a new entity."},"conflict_classification":"employment_supersession","answer":"Sam's Goldman employment is superseded; current memory should reflect that Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.","citations":["Existing memory: Sam works at Goldman","New: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72"],"repair_options":["Replace 'Sam works at Goldman' with 'Sam joined Point72 after leaving Goldman'.","Store Goldman only as a former employer and Point72 as current employer."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected direct contradiction on current employer.","Preserved the newer employment fact as current.","Avoided retaining superseded fact as current."]}}
